name: deadline-manager
title: Deadline Manager
description: View and create deadlines for your Discord server.
author: deadline-manager

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the Deadline Manager FastAPI server, e.g. https://deadlines.example.com

preferences.name: discordClientId
preferences.title: Discord Client ID
preferences.description: OAuth2 Client ID of the Discord application used for authentication.

commands.name: list-deadlines
commands.title: List Deadlines
commands.description: View upcoming deadlines for your Discord server.

commands.name: create-deadline
commands.title: Create Deadline
commands.description: Create a new deadline for your Discord server.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use the \`npm run publish\` script.

" && exit 1
